tracks.label: Startup
tracks.goal: Turn a customer problem into a validated venture direction, MVP, GTM plan, and pitch.

tracks.label: Web2 Product
tracks.goal: Design a practical SaaS, marketplace, internal tool, consumer app, or data product.

tracks.label: Web3 Product
tracks.goal: Choose an ecosystem, wallet path, onchain scope, and security-ready build plan.

tracks.label: AI App
tracks.goal: Scope an LLM, RAG, agent, voice, image, or workflow product with provider and cost awareness.

tracks.label: Data and ML
tracks.goal: Map datasets, benchmarks, notebooks, evaluation methods, and competition requirements.

tracks.label: Hackathon
tracks.goal: Fit a project to rules, bounty criteria, demo readiness, and submission quality.

tracks.label: Grant
tracks.goal: Translate an idea into ecosystem fit, milestones, budget, impact proof, and grant narrative.

tracks.label: Community Venture
tracks.goal: Build events, learning, membership, reputation, credentials, and community operating loops.

tracks.label: Accelerator Readiness
tracks.goal: Prepare and judge a startup for YC, Techstars, 500 Global, Antler, Entrepreneur First, Sequoia Arc, and other non-web3 accelerator or founder programs.

tracks.label: Presentation Deck
tracks.goal: Create and review decks for hackathons, investors, angels, accelerators, grants, demo days, and partner pitches.
